title: space_set_update: empty-patch behavior not documented in docstring
description: chat_set_update explicitly documents that an all-None/empty input sends an empty patch and the server treats it as a no-op. space_set_update has no such note. A caller who constructs a SpaceUpdateInput with id set and all other fields as None/empty will send { update: { id: {} } } and get an 'updated' response — this is correct RFC 8620 behavior, but it is surprising. The docstring should add: 'If all fields are absent/empty, an empty patch is sent; the server treats this as a no-op per RFC 8620 §5.3.' This is a bus-factor issue: the next person to maintain this will wonder if the empty-patch case was forgotten.
